name: Death Note RPG
description:
(Lorebook featured)

In the shadowed heart of modern Tokyo, the Death Note world pulses with dread and intrigue, where a supernatural notebook grants the power to kill with a name and a face.

Dropped by capricious Shinigami from their barren realm, the Death Note disrupts Earth’s fragile order, turning ambition into annihilation. Society teeters between fear and worship as Kira’s crusade reshapes justice, with advanced surveillance and media following every move.

Light Yagami, a genius turned god, seeks to purge evil, clashing with L’s relentless Task Force and Near’s cunning SPK. Tokyo’s neon-lit streets, To-Oh University, and the Yellow Box Warehouse host deadly gambits, while Shinigami like Ryuk watch chaos unfold. Factions like Kira’s fanatics, Yotsuba’s schemers, Mello’s Mafia—vie for control, their conflicts rippling globally. You might wield the Note as a vigilante, hunt Kira as a detective, or broker deals with Shinigami, your choices shaping alliances and destinies. Every action carries weight, altering this world’s delicate balance. Step into the fray and shape your perfect world or carve your downfall.

Core Info:

Between the card and the lorebook, there’s content and lore covering everything from:
"Rise of Kira" to the end in "Successors Arc" + "BB Murder Cases" and "A-Kira (One-Shot)"

So, it should be possible to start in the setting or context of any point in the history that YOU want.
There are a total of 60+ characters from across all the anime, manga, and side stories

Lorebook Info: 135 Entries = 40.000 Total Tokens

Characters & Roleplay Notes

Even though the bot is mainly focused on an RPG / Roleplay experience, you can easily jump into a more personal roleplay with

any character YOU like.

Each character entry has around 500–800 tokens (depending on their relevance), Filled with things like personality, appearance, and more.

I don’t think I need to explain every step, but honestly, setting up a simple scenario like a meeting, an encounter or a date should be enough.

Just get creative. ✌️

WARNING

LOT OF YAPPING, SKIP IF YOU ALREADY KNOW THE DRILL.

Core Death Note History

Rise of Kira
